description: Brompton A Line. The essential Brompton. The ride, the compact fold, the easy-to-store. Shop now. Free Delivery.
With a range of 45 miles, shop the range of Brompton Electric Folding Bikes. Arrive in effortless style with a folding e-bike.
Discover our electric bikes and get expert support for your urban adventures. Browse our support page now.
Discover the Brompton C Line, your perfect city companion. A foldable bike designed for convenience, reliability, and everyday commuting.
Folding Bikes, Fold Up City Bicycles, Mens & Ladies Folding Road Bikes | Brompton Bikes
Foldable electric bike from Brompton - the C Line electric. Compact, light and powerful you'll arrive in style on a C Line folding e-bike. Shop Now.
Brompton Electric P Line folding bike - next level freedom with our lightweight folding e-bike. Lighter. Faster. Even more portable. Shop Now.
G Line is the first ever Brompton with the ride feel of a full-size bike. Brand-new geometry, 20" wheels, game-changing comfort and capability. Find a store.
Lightweight folding bike - Introducing the P Line. High performance, lightweight design. A mix of performance & portability, meticulously engineered for city roads. Shop Now.
Brompton T Line is the ultimate solution for a super lightweight, ultra-compact & highly efficient fold-up bike. Ride the lightest bike out there. Shop Now.
Relaxed geometry, a sleek yet durable alumnium frame, and the control of hydraulic disc brakes. This comfortable, fast aluminium endurance bike is ready for all your rides.
Versatile carbon all-road endurance bike. 38 mm tyre clearance. VCLS Technology: comfort meets speed. Shimano CUES mechanical groupset. DT Swiss Endurance LN aluminium wheels.
Versatile carbon all-road endurance bike. 38 mm tyre clearance. VCLS Technology: iconic comfort seatpost. Shimano 105 Di2 electronic groupset. DT Swiss Endurance LN aluminum wheels.

A compact, electric trifold built for effortless city rides.
Named for its potential to make your life easier, the DAHON Dream is a tidy ride with 6 speeds via a compact rear derailleur.
A foldable electric SUV bike that combines off-road capability with urban portability.
Take back the streets! The Hit folding bike is the ultimate blend of portability and performance.
Eco-friendly folding bike with DAHON-V tech, offering speed, comfort, and a smooth internal gear hub with 3-speed shifting for urban rides.
10.4kg folding bike, DELTECH, with 15% higher frame rigidity, suitable for urban travel.
Ultra-light, responsive, built for speed and thrilling city rides.
Aluminum-frame  bicycle with a sporty design, available in many colors. Fun for the whole family, whether for sports, touring, shopping, or group outings – it handles everything with ease.
Lightweight and durable with classic design, offering smooth, flexible urban rides.
